theme.description: A highly functional, achromatic dashboard design inspired by Zenith and SaaSFrame patterns. It uses neutral colors, stark black/white contrasts, generous whitespace, and minimal text to let data (charts/tables) take center stage. 'Soft shadows' are paired with 1px sharp borders to maintain crispness.

typography.installation: Add Google Fonts imports for Outfit, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono in index.css

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border-b border-zinc-200/50 dark:border-zinc-800/50

layout.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

grid.charts_row: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6 (2 cols for Monthly Trends, 1 col for Category breakdown)

table.style: Minimalist, row borders only. No vertical dividers.

charts.styling: No grid lines or very faint dashed lines (strokeOpacity=0.1). Hide axis lines, keep only labels. Use stark monochrome with one accent color (e.g. primary vs muted) or distinct but muted categorical colors.
charts.tooltip: Custom tooltip mimicking the card surface styles.

animations.page_load: Staggered fade-up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) for cards and table rows.
animations.interactions: Slight scale (0.98) on click, subtle y-axis lift on card hover.
animations.transitions: layoutId for role switching if applicable, or smooth opacity crossfade.

admin_avatar.description: Professional woman with glasses, used for Admin role avatar

user_avatar.description: Young woman, used for standard User role avatar

empty_state.description: Minimalist empty workspace for 'No Data' or 'Empty Table' states

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. STATE MANAGEMENT (Zustand): Create a store to manage 'transactions' (array of objects), 'role' (admin | user), 'filters' (category, date range, search query), and 'theme' (light | dark). Populate with realistic mock data on initialization.
2. DATA PERSISTENCE: Use Zustand's 'persist' middleware to save the state to localStorage.
3. RBAC IMPLEMENTATION: 'Admin' sees all transactions. 'User' sees only their own transactions. Reflect this in the table, insights, and charts dynamically based on the selected role.
4. HEADER / NAV: Create a crystal glass header containing the App Logo, a Dark Mode toggle, an Export Button (CSV/JSON), and the Role Switcher (dropdown with avatars).
5. EXPORT FUNCTIONALITY: Implement a simple utility to convert the currently filtered transactions into CSV format and trigger a download.
6. UI FRAMEWORK: Use Tailwind CSS with Shadcn UI components. For charts, integrate Recharts matching the color palette (monochrome + subtle accents).
7. TESTING ATTRIBUTES: Ensure all buttons, form inputs, table rows, and interactable elements have 'data-testid' attributes (e.g., 'data-testid="role-switcher"').
8. EMPTY STATES: If a user filters out all data, show a beautiful empty state using the provided empty_state image, centered, with a 'Clear Filters' CTA.
